cover/Elixir.CodingAdventures.HierarchyAccess.html

File generated from /Users/adhithya/Downloads/antigravity/coding-adventures/code/packages/elixir/cache/lib/coding_adventures/cache_hierarchy.ex by cover at 2026-04-06 at 17:02:30

1 defmodule CodingAdventures.HierarchyAccess do
2 @moduledoc """
3 Record of one full hierarchy access.
4 """
5
6 @enforce_keys [:address, :served_by, :total_cycles, :hit_at_level]
7 defstruct [:address, :served_by, :total_cycles, :hit_at_level, level_accesses: []]
8
9 @type t :: %__MODULE__{
10 address: non_neg_integer(),
11 served_by: String.t(),
12 total_cycles: non_neg_integer(),
13 hit_at_level: non_neg_integer(),
14 level_accesses: [CodingAdventures.CacheAccess.t()]
15 }
16 end
17
18 defmodule CodingAdventures.CacheHierarchy do
19 @moduledoc """
20 Inclusive multi-level cache hierarchy.
21 """
22
23 alias CodingAdventures.Cache
24 alias CodingAdventures.HierarchyAccess
25
26 defstruct l1i: nil, l1d: nil, l2: nil, l3: nil, main_memory_latency: 100
27
28 @type t :: %__MODULE__{
29 l1i: Cache.t() | nil,
30 l1d: Cache.t() | nil,
31 l2: Cache.t() | nil,
32 l3: Cache.t() | nil,
33 main_memory_latency: non_neg_integer()
34 }
35
36 @spec new(keyword()) :: t()
37 def new(opts \\ []) do
38 %__MODULE__{
39 l1i: Keyword.get(opts, :l1i),
40 l1d: Keyword.get(opts, :l1d),
41 l2: Keyword.get(opts, :l2),
42 l3: Keyword.get(opts, :l3),
43 main_memory_latency: Keyword.get(opts, :main_memory_latency, 100)
44 }
45 end
46
47 @spec read(t(), non_neg_integer(), boolean(), non_neg_integer()) :: {t(), HierarchyAccess.t()}
48 def read(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy, address, is_instruction \\ false, cycle \\ 0)
49 when is_integer(address) and address >= 0 and is_boolean(is_instruction) and is_integer(cycle) and cycle >= 0 do
50 levels = level_specs(hierarchy, is_instruction)
51
52 if levels == [] do
53 {hierarchy,
54 %HierarchyAccess{
55 address: address,
56 served_by: "memory",
57 total_cycles: hierarchy.main_memory_latency,
58 hit_at_level: 0,
59 level_accesses: []
60 }}
61 else
62 do_read(hierarchy, levels, address, cycle)
63 end
64 end
65
66 @spec write(t(), non_neg_integer(), [non_neg_integer()] | nil, non_neg_integer()) ::
67 {t(), HierarchyAccess.t()}
68 def write(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy, address, data \\ nil, cycle \\ 0)
69 when is_integer(address) and address >= 0 and is_integer(cycle) and cycle >= 0 do
70 levels = level_specs(hierarchy, false)
71
72 if levels == [] do
73 {hierarchy,
74 %HierarchyAccess{
75 address: address,
76 served_by: "memory",
77 total_cycles: hierarchy.main_memory_latency,
78 hit_at_level: 0,
79 level_accesses: []
80 }}
81 else
82 [{first_name, first_key, first_cache} | rest] = levels
83 {updated_first, first_access} = Cache.write(first_cache, address, data, cycle)
84 hierarchy = put_level(hierarchy, first_key, updated_first)
85
86 if first_access.hit do
87 {hierarchy,
88 %HierarchyAccess{
89 address: address,
90 served_by: first_name,
91 total_cycles: first_cache.config.access_latency,
92 hit_at_level: 0,
93 level_accesses: [first_access]
94 }}
95 else
96 {hierarchy, accesses, total_cycles, served_by, hit_level} =
97 Enum.reduce_while(Enum.with_index(rest, 1), {hierarchy, [first_access], first_cache.config.access_latency, "memory", length(levels)}, fn {{name, key, cache}, index}, {acc_h, acc_accesses, acc_cycles, _served, _hit} ->
98 {updated_cache, access} = Cache.read(cache, address, 1, cycle)
99 next_h = put_level(acc_h, key, updated_cache)
100 next_cycles = acc_cycles + cache.config.access_latency
101
102 if access.hit do
103 {:halt, {next_h, acc_accesses ++ [access], next_cycles, name, index}}
104 else
105 {:cont, {next_h, acc_accesses ++ [access], next_cycles, "memory", length(levels)}}
106 end
107 end)
108
109 total_cycles =
110 if served_by == "memory",
111 do: total_cycles + hierarchy.main_memory_latency,
112 else: total_cycles
113
114 {hierarchy,
115 %HierarchyAccess{
116 address: address,
117 served_by: served_by,
118 total_cycles: total_cycles,
119 hit_at_level: hit_level,
120 level_accesses: accesses
121 }}
122 end
123 end
124 end
125
126 @spec invalidate_all(t()) :: t()
127 def invalidate_all(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy) do
128 hierarchy
129 |> maybe_invalidate(:l1i)
130 |> maybe_invalidate(:l1d)
131 |> maybe_invalidate(:l2)
132 |> maybe_invalidate(:l3)
133 end
134
135 @spec reset_stats(t()) :: t()
136 def reset_stats(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy) do
137 hierarchy
138 |> maybe_reset_stats(:l1i)
139 |> maybe_reset_stats(:l1d)
140 |> maybe_reset_stats(:l2)
141 |> maybe_reset_stats(:l3)
142 end
143
144 defp do_read(hierarchy, levels, address, cycle) do
145 {hierarchy, accesses, total_cycles, served_by, hit_level} =
146 Enum.reduce_while(Enum.with_index(levels), {hierarchy, [], 0, "memory", length(levels)}, fn {{name, key, cache}, index}, {acc_h, acc_accesses, acc_cycles, _served, _hit} ->
147 {updated_cache, access} = Cache.read(cache, address, 1, cycle)
148 next_h = put_level(acc_h, key, updated_cache)
149 next_cycles = acc_cycles + cache.config.access_latency
150
151 if access.hit do
152 {:halt, {next_h, acc_accesses ++ [access], next_cycles, name, index}}
153 else
154 {:cont, {next_h, acc_accesses ++ [access], next_cycles, "memory", length(levels)}}
155 end
156 end)
157
158 total_cycles =
159 if served_by == "memory",
160 do: total_cycles + hierarchy.main_memory_latency,
161 else: total_cycles
162
163 fill_data = List.duplicate(0, get_line_size(levels))
164
165 hierarchy =
166 if hit_level > 0 do
167 fill_higher_levels(hierarchy, Enum.take(levels, hit_level), address, fill_data, cycle)
168 else
169 hierarchy
170 end
171
172 {hierarchy,
173 %HierarchyAccess{
174 address: address,
175 served_by: served_by,
176 total_cycles: total_cycles,
177 hit_at_level: hit_level,
178 level_accesses: accesses
179 }}
180 end
181
182 defp fill_higher_levels(hierarchy, levels, address, fill_data, cycle) do
183 Enum.reduce(levels, hierarchy, fn {_name, key, cache}, acc ->
184 current_cache = Map.fetch!(acc, key)
185 {updated_cache, _evicted} = Cache.fill_line(current_cache || cache, address, fill_data, cycle)
186 put_level(acc, key, updated_cache)
187 end)
188 end
189
190 defp level_specs(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy, true) do
191 []
192 |> maybe_append_level("L1I", :l1i, hierarchy.l1i)
193 |> maybe_append_level("L2", :l2, hierarchy.l2)
194 |> maybe_append_level("L3", :l3, hierarchy.l3)
195 end
196
197 defp level_specs(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy, false) do
198 []
199 |> maybe_append_level("L1D", :l1d, hierarchy.l1d)
200 |> maybe_append_level("L2", :l2, hierarchy.l2)
201 |> maybe_append_level("L3", :l3, hierarchy.l3)
202 end
203
204 defp maybe_append_level(levels, _name, _key, nil), do: levels
205 defp maybe_append_level(levels, name, key, cache), do: levels ++ [{name, key, cache}]
206
207 defp get_line_size([{_name, _key, cache} | _]), do: cache.config.line_size
208 defp get_line_size([]), do: 64
209
210 defp put_level(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy, key, value), do: Map.put(hierarchy, key, value)
211
212 defp maybe_invalidate(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy, key) do
213 case Map.get(hierarchy, key) do
214 nil -> hierarchy
215 cache -> Map.put(hierarchy, key, Cache.invalidate(cache))
216 end
217 end
218
219 defp maybe_reset_stats(%__MODULE__{} = hierarchy, key) do
220 case Map.get(hierarchy, key) do
221 nil -> hierarchy
222 cache -> Map.put(hierarchy, key, %{cache | stats: CodingAdventures.CacheStats.reset(cache.stats)})
223 end
224 end
225 end
Line Hits Source
